title: Mush's Vanilla+ Experience
description: This is my turn to Vanilla Minecraft. I tweaked a lot, but not so much that the game feels unnatural.
body:
# 🔴 Mush's Vanilla+ Experience 
**Also wanna create a forever world, but don't know what mods to use? I've got you covered!**

This modpack is filled to the brim with little tweaks that just make the overall minecraft experience better. My most important requirement on the mods I use is: If it stops working, it cannot change the world itself. That gives me the freedom of adding and removing mods without the fear of losing or unwillingly changing my world.

## ✨ Details
- A lot of small, quality of life tweaks 
- Some quality vanilla+ resource packs
- Custom low-profile world generation
- Protection to your world (Cherished worlds, Delete worlds to trash, etc)
- The best configuration for balance between visuals and smooth gameplay ([based on FPS Perfected Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fps-perfected-lite))
- Some great low-profile shaders
- Made use of the Locator bar in singleplayer (Locator Lodestones)
- Extra Vanilla+ Structures to explore

## 🎉 Just installed it! What to do now?
Thanks for downloading! You could now personalize your game by:
- Set up resource packs
- Set the **Gui Scale** in **Video settings** to your preferred liking, I use 3x
- Set up shaders
- Make your world! If you need a cool seed, check out the seeds below!

## 🌍 Need a seed?

### - For 1.21.10 - 7298192597599661140
I created 14 worlds to find the best one to start in for myself. this is the seed of the final world.
### - For 1.21.11 - 5656647009720680206
This was the first world I created on .11, and I loved it. Check out the picture in the gallery!

## 🎈 Extra Touch  
Mush's Vanilla+ Experience includes tweaks from [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/).

[☕ Support Me!](https://buymeacoffee.com/mushbroom)
